              <script>
                (() => {
                  const articleBlockSelector = '.ui-story';
                  const flickerSelector = ['.ui-story-headline', '.ui-story-media'].filter(n=>n).join(',');
                  const chartbeatFlicker = (window.chartbeatFlicker = window.chartbeatFlicker || {});
                  window._sf_async_config.articleBlockSelector = articleBlockSelector;
        
                  // once it loads, the chartbeat headline testing script removes this styletag hiding the headlines...
                  const style = document.createElement('style');
                  style.id = 'chartbeat-flicker-control-style-ht';
                  style.textContent = `${flickerSelector} { visibility: hidden }`;
                  document.head.appendChild(style);
        
                  // ...unless it takes more than 1000ms, then it is removed here
                  window.setTimeout(() => {
                    style.parentNode && style.parentNode.removeChild(style);
                  }, 1000);
                })()
              </script>

                window.sdc = window.sdc || {};
                window.sdc.consentRoadblockMapping = JSON.parse('{"podcast":{"title":"Podcast","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"spreaker","single-click-enabled":true},"tweet":{"title":"X","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","style":"--width: 7; --height:4;","vendor-name":"twitter","single-click-enabled":true},"youtube":{"title":"YouTube","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"youtube","single-click-enabled":true},"facebook-markup":{"title":"Facebook","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"facebook","single-click-enabled":true},"instagram":{"title":"Instagram","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"1\/1","vendor-name":"instagram","single-click-enabled":true},"instagram-markup":{"title":"Instagram","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"1\/1","vendor-name":"instagram","single-click-enabled":true},"tiktok-markup":{"title":"TikTok","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"1\/1","vendor-name":"tiktok","single-click-enabled":true},"spreaker-podcast-markup":{"title":"Spreaker","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"spreaker","single-click-enabled":true},"spotify-podcast-markup":{"title":"Spotify","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"spotify","single-click-enabled":true},"apple-podcast-markup":{"title":"Apple Podcasts","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"apple-inc","single-click-enabled":true},"captivate-podcast-markup":{"title":"Captivate","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"captivate","single-click-enabled":true},"datawrapper":{"title":"Datawrapper","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"1\/1","vendor-name":"datawrapper","single-click-enabled":true},"tune-in":{"title":"TuneIn","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"tune-in","single-click-enabled":true},"threads":{"title":"Threads","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"threads","single-click-enabled":true},"monterosa":{"title":"Monterosa","text":"Due to your consent preferences, you\u2019re not able to view this.","link":"#privacy-options","link-text":"Open Privacy Options","aspect-ratio":"16\/9","vendor-name":"monterosa","single-click-enabled":true}}' || 'null');
        
                window.sdc.createConsentCookie = function(vendorConsents) {
                    const consentedVendors = vendorConsents.consentedVendors || [];
                    const grants = vendorConsents.grants;
                    const mappedVendors = [...new Set(consentedVendors
                            .filter(vendor => grants[vendor._id].vendorGrant)
                            .map(vendor => vendor._id)
                            .map(id => {
                                return window.sdc.consentIdMapping.find(
                                        vendorRecord => vendorRecord.sourcepointId === id
                                );
                            })
                            .filter(record => !!record))];
        
                    const consentString = ":" + mappedVendors.map(vendor => vendor.gdpId).join(':') + ":";
                    let expiryDate = new Date();
                    expiryDate.setMonth(expiryDate.getMonth() + 3);
                    document.cookie = 'consents=' + consentString +'; expires=' + expiryDate + '; path=/';
                    mappedVendors
                        .forEach(vendor => {
                            document.querySelectorAll(`[data-vendor-name="${vendor.vendorName.toLowerCase()}"]`).forEach((e) => e.dataset.consent = true);
                        });
        
                    document.querySelectorAll(`[data-vendor-name="iab-vendor"]`).forEach((e) => e.dataset.consent = true);
        
                    const pendingVendors = document.querySelectorAll('[data-consent="pending"]');
                    if (pendingVendors.length){
                        pendingVendors.forEach(vendor => {
                            vendor.dataset.consent = false;
                        });
                    }
                }
        
                __tcfapi('addEventListener', 2, function(tcData, success) {
                    if (success) {
                        if (tcData.eventStatus === 'useractioncomplete') {
                           __tcfapi('getCustomVendorConsents', 2, function(vendorConsents, success) {
                               if (success) {
                                   window.sdc.createConsentCookie(vendorConsents)
                               }
                           })
                        }
                    }
                });
        
                document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
                    const consentsCookie = document.cookie
                        .split('; ')
                        .find(row => row.startsWith('consents='));
                    if (consentsCookie) {
                        const consentsValue = consentsCookie.split('=')[1];
                        for (const vendor of window.sdc.consentIdMapping) {
                            if (consentsValue.includes(`:${vendor.gdpId}:`)) {
                                document.querySelectorAll(`[data-vendor-name="${vendor.vendorName}"]:not([data-consent="true"])`).forEach((e) => {
                                    if (e) {
                                        e.dataset.consent = true
                                    }
                                });
                            } else {
                                document.querySelectorAll(`[data-vendor-name="${vendor.vendorName}"]:not([data-consent="false"])`).forEach((e) => {
                                    if (e) {
                                        e.dataset.consent = false
                                    }
                                });
                            }
                      }
                      document.querySelectorAll(`[data-vendor-name="iab-vendor"]`).forEach((function(e) {
                          e.dataset.consent = true
                      }));
                    }
        
                        if (!consentsCookie) {
                            __tcfapi('getCustomVendorConsents', 2, function(vendorConsents, success) {
                                if (success && !vendorConsents.newUser) {
                                    window.sdc.createConsentCookie(vendorConsents)
                                }
                            })
                        }
        
                        window.addEventListener('load', (event) => {
                            setTimeout(function() {
                                const consentsCookie = document.cookie
                                        .split('; ')
                                        .find(row => row.startsWith('consents='));
        
                                if (!consentsCookie) {
                                    __tcfapi('ping', 2, (pingReturn) => {
                                        if (!pingReturn.cmpLoaded) {
                                            document.querySelectorAll(`[data-consent="pending"]`).forEach((function(e) {
                                                e.dataset.consent = "fallback"
                                            }));
                                        }
                                    });
                                }
                            }, 500);
                        });
                });
            </script>
        
        <script data-consent="pending" data-vendor-name="adobe-analytics">
            const cookieExists = document.cookie.split(";").some((item) => item.trim().startsWith("testGroup="));
        
            function clearCookie() {
                if (cookieExists) {
                    document.cookie = `testGroup=; expires=Thu, 01 Jan 1970 00:00:00 UTC; path=/;";`
                }
            }
        
            function acceptCallback() {
                    if (!cookieExists) {
                        let expiry = new Date(Date.now() + 7889400000);
                        let abTestPercentDecimal = 5 / 100;
                        if (Math.random() < abTestPercentDecimal) {
                            document.cookie = `testGroup=B; expires=${expiry.toUTCString()}; path=/;";`
                        }
                        else {
                            document.cookie = `testGroup=A; expires=${expiry.toUTCString()}; path=/;";`
                        }
        
                    }
            }
        
            function rejectCallback() {
                clearCookie();
            }
        
            (function(){
                if (!window.sdc || !window.sdc.checkConsent){
                    acceptCallback();
                    return;
                }
        
                window.sdc.checkConsent(document.currentScript, acceptCallback, rejectCallback);
            })();
        </script>
        
    <script
        data-testid="feature-flags"
        data-test-flag="false"
        data-test-flag-value=""
        data-test-flag-with-default-value="123"
        data-test-flag-variant="a"
    ></script>
</head>

                >

                        document.currentScript.parentNode.config = {"id":"leaderboard","ad-type":"leaderboard","test-id":"advert-unit--leaderboard-full-bleed","targeting":{"platform":"live","advert-targeting":"'platform': 'live'","position":"homepagetopslot"},"size":{"mobile":[[320,50],[300,50]],"tablet":[[728,90]],"desktop":[[728,90],[970,250]]}}

                <h1 class="u-hide-visually">Sky News Homepage</h1>

                            <section class="wrap section-gap gap-500" aria-labelledby="page-section-0" data-testid="page-section">
                                    <h2 class="ui-section-header  section-header" id="page-section-0" data-testid="section-header" data-type="">
                
                    <span class="ui-section-header-title " >TOP STORIES</span>
            
            </h2>            <div class="grid-areas" data-layout="111-2|3-4-5-6" data-type="article-list" data-testid="section-grid-area">
                                            <div class="grid-cell">
                                                <article class="ui-story"
    data-source="upp"
    data-hero="true" 
    data-divider=""
    data-opinion=""
    data-has-media=""
    data-media-icon=""
    data-has-label="true"
    data-hide-significance-label=""

    data-format="col"
    data-m1="row"
    data-t1=""
    data-t2="row"
    data-d1=""
    data-d2=""
    data-theme="live"
    data-testid="story"
>
    <div class="ui-story-wrap">
        <div class="ui-story-figure" data-testid="story-image">
                <div class="ui-story-media-container">
                    <picture>
                            <source srcset="https://e3.365dm.com/26/02/384x216/skynews-volodymyr-zelenskyy_7173467.jpg?20260224082618 380w, https://e3.365dm.com/26/02/768x432/skynews-volodymyr-zelenskyy_7173467.jpg?20260224082618" width="1600" height="900" sizes="auto">

                    </picture>
                </div>
            <div class="ui-story-label" data-testid="story-label">
                 <div class="ui-label" data-role="label" data-size="" data-type="live" data-icon="live-pulse-animated" data-is-significance="true"  data-testid="label">
    <svg data-animation="live-pulse" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="presentation" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
    <circle class="live-pulse-dot" transform="translate(10, 10)" r="5.44" fill="currentColor"/>

            <div class="ui-story-content">
                 <div class="ui-story-label ui-story-label-duplicate" aria-hidden="true">
                     <div class="ui-label" data-role="label" data-size="" data-type="live" data-icon="live-pulse-animated" data-is-significance="true"  data-testid="label-duplicate">
    <svg data-animation="live-pulse" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="presentation" viewBox="0 0 20 20">
    <circle class="live-pulse-dot" transform="translate(10, 10)" r="5.44" fill="currentColor"/>
    <circle class="live-pulse-ring" transform="translate(10, 10)" r="9.16" fill="transparent" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" />
</svg> 
    <div data-role="label-hidden-text" class="u-hide-visually" data-testid="label-a11y-text">Live</div>

</div>
                    
                </div>
                <a href="/story/ukraine-war-latest-vladimir-putin-has-started-wwiii-zelenskyy-says-on-cusp-of-war-anniversary-12541713" 
                    class="ui-story-headline" 
                     
                    data-id="12541713" 
                    data-role="rail-story" 
                    data-title="Zelenskyy belittles Putin in war anniversary message - as Moscow makes &#x27;nuclear bomb&#x27; claim" 
                    data-testid="story-headline" 
                    
                        data-tracking-variable="containerLinkDetails" 
                        data-tracking-value="cPos&#x3D;1_type&#x3D;article-list_title&#x3D;TOP STORIES_aPos&#x3D;1_aCo&#x3D;10_aID&#x3D;12541713"
                >
                    Zelenskyy belittles Putin in war anniversary message - as Moscow makes &#x27;nuclear bomb&#x27; claim
                </a>

                    <section class="wrap section-gap gap-500" aria-labelledby="page-section-1" data-testid="page-section">
                            <h2 class="ui-section-header  section-header" id="page-section-1" data-testid="section-header" data-type="">
                
                    <span class="ui-section-header-title " >Four years of war</span>
            
            </h2>            <div class="grid-areas" data-layout="1-2-3-4" data-type="article-list" data-testid="section-grid-area">
                                    <div class="grid-cell">
                                <article class="ui-story"
    data-source="upp"
    data-hero="" 
    data-divider=""
    data-opinion=""
    data-has-media=""

                >
                    France&#x27;s row with US ambassador heats up after meeting no-show
                </a>
            </div>

                    <span class="ui-section-header-title " >Editor&#x27;s picks</span>

                    <section class="wrap section-gap gap-500" aria-labelledby="page-section-9" data-testid="page-section">
                            <h2 class="ui-section-header  section-header" id="page-section-9" data-testid="section-header" data-type="">
                <a href="https://news.sky.com/topic/podcasts-8135"  class="ui-section-header-link">
                    <span class="ui-section-header-title " >Listen to Sky News podcasts</span>
                <svg viewBox="0 0 20 32" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" role="presentation"><path clip-rule="evenodd" d="m.178801 1.47764c.329475-.35373 1.301829-1.47792642 2.028289-1.47792642.31822.01145682.58823.12459242.85181.35516042l16.5011 14.699126c.5867.5227.5867 1.3705 0 1.8918l-16.5011 14.699c-.26358.232-.53359.3452-.85181.3552-.72646 0-1.698814-1.1228-2.028289-1.4779-.067503-.0731-.1253628-.1375-.17840046-.1962l16.07679946-14.3253-16.07679946-14.32533c.05303766-.05872.11089746-.12459.17840046-.19763z" fill-rule="evenodd"/></svg>
                </a>
            </h2>            <div class="grid-areas" data-layout="1-2-3-4" data-type="article-list" data-testid="section-grid-area">
                                    <div class="grid-cell">
                                <article class="ui-story"
    data-source="upp"
    data-hero="" 
    data-divider=""
    data-opinion=""
    data-has-media="true"
    data-media-icon="podcast"
    data-has-label=""
    data-hide-significance-label=""
    data-has-blog=""
    data-format="row"
    data-m1="col rtl"
    data-t1=""
    data-t2=""
    data-d1=""
    data-d2=""
    data-theme=""
    data-testid="story"
>
    <div class="ui-story-wrap">
        <div class="ui-story-figure" data-testid="story-image">
                <div class="ui-story-media-container">
                    <picture>
                            <source srcset="https://e3.365dm.com/25/10/384x216/skynews-cheat-sheet-podcast_7067863.png?20251103062812 380w, https://e3.365dm.com/25/10/768x432/skynews-cheat-sheet-podcast_7067863.png?20251103062812" media="(min-width:600px)" width="1600" height="900" sizes="auto">
                            <source srcset="https://e3.365dm.com/25/10/192x144/skynews-cheat-sheet-podcast_7067863.png?20251103062812 200w, https://e3.365dm.com/25/10/384x288/skynews-cheat-sheet-podcast_7067863.png?20251103062812" width="400" height="300" sizes="auto">
                            <img src="https://e3.365dm.com/25/10/384x288/skynews-cheat-sheet-podcast_7067863.png?20251103062812" alt="" loading="lazy" width="400" height="300" class="ui-story-media" aria-hidden="true">
                    </picture>
                </div>
            <div class="ui-story-label" data-testid="story-label">

                    <section class="wrap section-gap gap-500" aria-labelledby="page-section-13" data-testid="page-section">
                            <h2 class="ui-section-header  section-header" id="page-section-13" data-testid="section-header" data-type="">

        (async () => {
  window.sdc.loadModuleFromName = (name) => {
    const path = window.sdc.modules[name];
    return import(path);
  }

  window.sdc.initModuleFromName = (name, autoload) => {
    document.querySelectorAll(`
      [data-component-name="${name}"], 
      [data-component-name-alias="${name}"]
    `).forEach(async (root) => {
      if (root.dataset.autoload === 'false' && autoload) {
        return;
      }
      const path = window.sdc.modules[name];
      if (!path) { 
        console.error(`Component ${name} does not exist`);
        return;
      }
      const module = await import(path);
      const options = Object.assign({}, root.dataset);
      module.default(root, options);
    });
  };

  // load pubsub
  const pubSub = await import(window.sdc.modules['sdc-site-pub-sub']);
  pubSub.default.init(window.sdc);

  // load modules from list
  Object.keys(window.sdc.modules).forEach((name) => {
    window.sdc.initModuleFromName(name, true);
  });
})();;
    </script>

        <script type="text/javascript" data-consent="false" data-vendor-name="qualtrics">
        var init = function() {
            var g = function(e, h, f, g) {
                this.get = function(a) {
                    for (var a = a + "=", c = document.cookie.split(";"), b = 0, e = c.length; b < e; b++)
        
                    {
                        for (var d = c[b];
                            " " == d.charAt(0);) d = d.substring(1, d.length);
                        if (0 == d.indexOf(a)) return d.substring(a.length, d.length)
                    }
                    return null
                };
                this.set = function(a, c) {
                    var b = "",
                        b = new Date;
                    b.setTime(b.getTime(), 6048E5);
                    b = "; expires=" + b.toGMTString();
                    document.cookie = a + "=" + c + b + "; path=/; "
                };
                this.check = function() {
                    var a = this.get(f);
                    if (a) a = a.split(":");
                    else if (100 != e) "v" == h && (e = Math.random() >= e / 100 ? 0 : 100), a = [h, e, 0], this.set(f, a.join(":"));
                    else return !0;
                    var c = a[1];
                    if (100 == c) return !0;
                    switch (a[0])
        
                    {
                        case "v":
                            return !1;
                        case "r":
                            return c = a[2] % Math.floor(100 / c), a[2]++, this.set(f, a.join(":")), !c
                    }
                    return !0
                };
                this.go = function() {
                    if (this.check()) {
                        var a = document.createElement("script");
                        a.type = "text/javascript";
                        a.src = g;
                        document.body && document.body.appendChild(a)
                    }
                };
                this.start = function() {
                    var t = this;
                    "complete" !== document.readyState ? window.addEventListener ? window.addEventListener("load", function()
        
                        {
                            t.go()
                        }, !1) : window.attachEvent && window.attachEvent("onload", function() {
                        t.go()
                    }) : t.go()
                };
            };
        
            try
        
            {
                (new g(100, "r", "QSI_S_ZN_eS6tSYzPAKMjhs2", "https://znecb9ajgqf1ugx9q-skydesign.siteintercept.qualtrics.com/SIE/?Q_ZID=ZN_eS6tSYzPAKMjhs2")).start()
            } catch(e) {}
        };
        
        (function(){
            if (!window.sdc || !window.sdc.checkConsent){
                init();
                return;
            }
        
            window.sdc.checkConsent(document.currentScript, init);
        })();
        </script>
        
        <!-- qualtrics integration -->
        <div id="ZN_eS6tSYzPAKMjhs2"></div>
    
      <script type="text/javascript">_satellite.pageBottom();</script>
    <script type="text/javascript"  src="/LbQmRq-UjbzP9zGRYd6lz3RdZys/tVN1mbLi/D2MNAQ/biNmIwB/KSz4PAg?v=9b6d8c16-60c6-b264-1996-1e7fc5c63d13" defer></script></body>
</html>
